title: Writing - Part 2: Exercise 1
description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in 220-260 words.

tasks.title: Report
tasks.prompt: You are the manager of a local crafts market. Write a report assessing the impact of tourism on local craftspeople and suggest enhancements for future growth.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Impact of Tourism on Local Craftspeople 

Introduction 
The purpose of this report is to assess the effects of tourism on local craftspeople in our community. Despite a marked increase in visitor numbers, concern remains regarding sustainable economic benefits for artisans.

Current Situation 
Initially, there has been a noticeable rise in sales at the weekly market. Craftspeople have benefitted from tourists’ interest in unique, handmade goods, which in turn has led to a greater appreciation of local culture. However, seasonal fluctuations in tourist numbers lead to inconsistent income for many artisans, creating financial instability.

Recommendations 
To ensure continued growth and stability, it is recommended that several measures be implemented. Firstly, establishing an online marketplace would allow for year-round sales opportunities, mitigating seasonal impacts. Secondly, hosting workshops where tourists can create their own crafts could enrich their experience and increase spending. Finally, forming partnerships with nearby hotels to offer tourists exclusive craft vouchers could further boost sales.

Conclusion 
In conclusion, while tourism has generally had a positive impact on local craftspeople, the potential for year-round income cannot be overlooked. By implementing the above recommendations, we are likely to see sustained growth in this important sector.

tasks.title: Email/Letter
tasks.prompt: Write a formal letter to the director of a company applying for a position as an operations manager with a focus on sustainable practices.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Dear Mr. Thompson,

I am writing to express my interest in the position of Operations Manager advertised on your company’s website. With a robust background in supply chain management and a commitment to sustainable practices, I am eager to contribute to your company’s success.

My previous role at Green Solutions Inc. saw me improve operational efficiency by 20% via innovative waste-reduction strategies and supplier evaluations focused on sustainability. Such initiatives have not only enhanced environmental outcomes but also delivered significant cost savings and strengthened brand reputation.

Having obtained a Master’s degree in Environmental Management, I possess a comprehensive understanding of sustainable development practices which are critical in today’s business climate. Furthermore, my experience in cross-functional project management equips me with the capability to lead teams effectively toward achieving corporate sustainability goals.

I am particularly impressed by your company’s commitment to environmentally responsible operations and the vision outlined in your latest sustainability report. I am keen to bring my expertise in aligning operational activities with your environmental objectives, thereby contributing to the overall value proposition.

I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team. Thank you for considering my application.

Yours sincerely,

Rebecca Allen

tasks.title: Review
tasks.prompt: Write a review for a technology magazine about a new productivity software designed for remote teams.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Efficient Together: Revolutionizing Remote Work 

With the surge in remote work, productivity software has become indispensable. 'Efficient Together,' the latest offering in this field, promises to streamline collaboration across dispersed teams.

Upon first use, one is struck by the intuitive interface, which facilitates easy navigation even for the less tech-savvy. The software boasts an array of features: from document sharing to integrated chat and project timelines, it is a one-stop-shop for remote project management.

However, it is the real-time editing and seamless video conferencing capability that truly stand out. Never before has virtual collaboration felt so synchronized. Furthermore, the software's in-built analytics feature provides insightful productivity metrics, enabling managers to fine-tune workflows effectively.

Yet, some aspects may deter potential users. The initial setup demands a significant learning curve, and the pricing model, while reflective of the comprehensive features offered, may not be feasible for smaller firms with restricted budgets.

In conclusion, 'Efficient Together' embodies the future of remote work technology, delivering on most of its promises with aplomb. Though not without its drawbacks, its innovative tools make it a worthy investment for larger teams seeking to enhance productivity. For those ready to embrace a new era of digital collaboration, Efficient Together offers an impressive gateway.
